reliabilityChanges: Startup and History keep archived transcript bodies out of React and WebView memory until a user explicitly opens one.
History search, Ask, and whole-library indexing verify transcript archives sequentially with cancellation and fail-closed integrity checks.
Ask retains only bounded top lexical candidates and validates semantic excerpts against chunks derived from the same current verified transcript.
View Complete Transcript loads one exact archived body; Hide Transcript releases it from application state and the DOM without altering durable storage.

focusedCoverage: 500 archived transcripts scan with maximum one active read
missing transcript archive scan fails closed
lazy History search and transcript display
exact transcript and embedding-schema index identity
complete Markdown and final-page PDF markers

ios.knownHostGate: devicectl timed out waiting for CoreDeviceService to fully initialize; the previous Xcode 26.3 attempt could not mount a developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, unit, high-cardinality storage, and rendered browser proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute capture, native saved-audio transcription, interruption or memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
